description: The Comanchero Motorcycle Club is an outlaw motorcycle gang based in Australia, with chapters in Southeast Asia and New Zealand. Founded in 1968 by William George 'Jock' Ross in Sydney, the club is known for its violent history, including the 1984 Milperra massacre. The Comancheros are involved in drug trafficking and have been engaged in ongoing conflicts with rival clubs such as the Hells Angels and Bandidos.

country_links.evidence_quote: Mark Buddle was extradited from Turkey to Australia to face charges of drug smuggling on 2 August 2022.
country_links.context: The Comanchero Motorcycle Club has members detained in Turkey, and a former leader was extradited from Turkey to Australia.

country_links.evidence_quote: When visiting the United States with Charles Paul "Charlie" Scibberas... Spencer met with members of the Texan motorcycle club the Bandidos and the two gangs became allies.
country_links.context: The Comanchero Motorcycle Club allied with the Bandidos in the United States and planned to smuggle P2P into the United States.
